days.title: Arrival in Tokyo
days.subtitle: Exploring bustling Shinjuku

timeline.title: Arrive at Shinjuku Station
timeline.detail: Your flight lands at Narita Airport. Take the Narita Express to Shinjuku Station, a vibrant hub filled with shops and restaurants.

timeline.title: Check in to Hotel Gracery Shinjuku
timeline.detail: Drop your luggage at this themed hotel famous for its Godzilla head! Centrally located with easy access to many attractions.

timeline.title: Stroll around Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden
timeline.detail: Wander through this beautiful park featuring traditional Japanese gardens. Perfect for relaxing and taking photos of cherry blossoms in spring.
timeline.mapQuery: Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Dinner at Omoide Yokocho
timeline.detail: Visit this alleyway filled with tiny izakayas serving delicious yakitori and ramen. It's a great spot to try local flavors in a casual atmosphere.

timeline.title: Observatory at the Tokyo Metropolitan Government Building
timeline.detail: Head to the free observation deck for breathtaking nighttime views of Tokyo. Capture the city lights and the sights of Mt. Fuji on a clear night.
timeline.mapQuery: Tokyo Metropolitan Government Building, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Return to Hotel
timeline.detail: Head back to the hotel to rest after a bustling first day in Tokyo, reflecting on the vibrant experiences and sights.

localTips: Download the Tokyo subway app for easier navigation around the city.
Purchase a Suica card for convenient travel on public transportation.
Try to eat at small local restaurants for authentic Japanese food experiences.

days.title: Cultural Day in Tokyo
days.subtitle: Temples and shopping in Harajuku

timeline.title: Breakfast at the hotel
timeline.detail: Enjoy a traditional Japanese breakfast at the hotel restaurant featuring miso soup, grilled fish, and rice. A perfect way to start your day!

timeline.title: Visit Meiji Shrine
timeline.detail: Stroll through the forested paths leading to Meiji Shrine. Take part in a traditional Shinto blessing ritual and enjoy the peace of this spiritual site.

timeline.title: Explore Harajuku's Takeshita Street
timeline.detail: Experience the vibrant fashion scene on Takeshita Street. Discover unique shops selling trendy clothing, accessories, and quirky snacks.

timeline.title: Lunch at shops in Harajuku
timeline.detail: Grab a crepe or try some unique Japanese street food like taiyaki — fish-shaped cakes filled with deliciously sweet fillings.

timeline.title: Shopping in Shibuya
timeline.detail: Head over to Shibuya for more shopping. Visit Shibuya 109, the iconic fashion mall, and experience the famous Shibuya Crossing.

timeline.title: Dinner at Genki Sushi
timeline.detail: Enjoy sushi at Genki Sushi, where your plates are delivered via a conveyor belt. It's fun and delicious, with great prices!

timeline.title: Golden Gai Bar Hopping
timeline.detail: Experience the nightlife in the tiny bars of Golden Gai, known for their unique themes. Enjoy local drinks and soak in the local culture.

timeline.title: Return to Hotel
timeline.detail: Walk back to your hotel, reflecting on an exciting day filled with cultural experiences and new flavors.

localTips: Get a Google Translate app for easy communication, if needed.
Make sure to check the opening hours of shops, as they vary in different areas.
Try different seasonal foods available in various districts!

days.title: Exploring Asakusa and Tokyo Bay
days.subtitle: Historic temples and waterfront views

timeline.title: Breakfast at the hotel
timeline.detail: Fuel up with a hearty breakfast featuring both Western and traditional Japanese dishes to prepare for the day's adventures.

timeline.title: Visit Senso-ji Temple
timeline.detail: Explore Tokyo's oldest temple, Senso-ji, and walk through the iconic Nakamise shopping street where you can find local snacks and souvenirs.

timeline.title: Lunch at Asakusa
timeline.detail: Enjoy delicious tempura or soba noodles in the traditional Asakusa district. Look for eateries that offer unique local flavors.

timeline.title: Tokyo Skytree
timeline.detail: Take the elevator up to Tokyo Skytree for unparalleled panoramic views of the city — a perfect spot for great photographs.

timeline.title: Evening River Cruise
timeline.detail: Relax on a scenic river cruise along the Sumida River, enjoying views of the cityscape and iconic landmarks as the sun sets.

timeline.title: Farewell Dinner in Ginza
timeline.detail: Indulge in your farewell dinner at a luxurious restaurant in Ginza, trying high-end sushi or kaiseki meal — a perfect ending to your trip.

timeline.title: Return to Hotel
timeline.detail: Head back to your hotel to pack and prepare for departure. Take some time to reflect on the memorable experiences in Tokyo.

localTips: Buy souvenirs from Nakamise street at Senso-ji — they're ideal gifts!
Make dinner reservations in advance for popular restaurants.
Take note of the last train timings to ensure you return comfortably.

hotels.name: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku
hotels.note: Famous for its Godzilla head, centrally located in Shinjuku.

budget.note: Return flight from SIN to NRT

urgent.label: Book Tokyo Skytree tickets
urgent.note: Ensure you secure your spot for the observatory
